info.author: Zyneon Studios
info.description: Zyneon+ allows you to play Minecraft with more FPS, shaders, texture features and much more optimized. You can also easily invite friends to your worlds and play together! (testing, unstable)
info.name: Zyneon+ Experimental (testing, unstable)
